name: EdgeChamfer.EdgeChamferAttributes
summary: The EdgeChamferAttributes class is the attributes class for the edge chamfer.

constructors.name: EdgeChamfer.EdgeChamferAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new default edge chamfer attributes instance that loads standard attributes.

constructors.name: EdgeChamfer.EdgeChamferAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new edge chamfer attributes instance that loads the specified attributes.

params.name: AttributeFile
params.doc: The filename of the attribute file.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

methods.name: LoadAttributes
methods.summary: Loads the attributes from the attribute file.

params.name: AttributeFile
params.doc: The filename of the attribute file.

returns.doc: True if the attributes are loaded correctly. False if the attribute file loading failed.

properties.name: VisibleLines
properties.summary: The line type of the chamfer.
